context: Create src/ws/broadcaster.rs: EventBroadcaster{sender: tokio::sync::broadcast::Sender<Arc<WsEvent>>}. new(capacity:usize). fn send(&self, event:WsEvent) wrapping in Arc and ignoring SendError (no subscribers is fine). fn subscribe(&self)->broadcast::Receiver<Arc<WsEvent>>. cargo test -p anvilml-server -- broadcaster exits 0: subscribe, send, receive equal event; send with no subscribers does not error.

Add broadcaster: Arc<EventBroadcaster> to AppState (capacity from cfg.limits.ws_broadcast_capacity). Create src/ws/handler.rs: ws_events(WebSocketUpgrade, State)->on_upgrade. On connect subscribe; forward each Arc<WsEvent> as Message::Text(json). On RecvError::Lagged close with code 1008. No history replay. Wire GET /v1/events. Add tokio-tungstenite dev-dep. cargo test -p anvilml-server --features mock-hardware -- ws exits 0: connect, broadcast a test event, assert received as JSON text.

In ws/handler.rs add a ping task: tokio::time::interval(30s) sending Message::Ping(vec![]) to the socket; on send error end the connection. Run alongside the broadcast-forward task via tokio::select! so either ending closes the socket. cargo test -p anvilml-server --features mock-hardware -- ws still exits 0 (no regression).

Create src/ws/stats_tick.rs: spawn_system_stats_tick(state)->JoinHandle. Every 5s build SystemStatsEvent: per-device vram from AppState.hardware (used 0 until worker reports exist), host ram via sysinfo; broadcaster.send(WsEvent::SystemStats). Call it from build_router setup or main startup. Verify via next task.

description: anvilml: start stats tick at startup; verify live WS stream
context: In main.rs after AppState built, call spawn_system_stats_tick(state.clone()). Ensure broadcaster + tick are live for the bound server. Verify: cargo run --features mock-hardware, then in another shell `websocat ws://127.0.0.1:8488/v1/events` (or a browser WS console) shows a system.stats JSON frame arriving every ~5 seconds with event='system.stats' and a timestamp.

description: anvilml: add real-hardware lint steps to rust-linux and rust-windows CI jobs
context: Edit .github/workflows/ci.yml only. In rust-linux job add step after Real-hardware compile check: name Real-hardware lint, run cargo clippy --bin anvilml -- -D warnings. In rust-windows job add step after Real-hardware compile check: name Real-hardware lint, run cargo clippy --bin anvilml -- -D warnings. No features flag on either. All existing jobs and steps preserved unchanged. Acceptance: grep -c "Real-hardware lint" .github/workflows/ci.yml returns 2.

description: anvilml: introduce [workspace.dependencies] and upgrade all external deps to current stable
context: Introduce [workspace.dependencies] in root Cargo.toml. Use mcp-rust-docs to resolve the current stable version of every external dependency currently declared across all per-crate Cargo.toml files. Populate [workspace.dependencies] with those current versions and their required features. Update every per-crate Cargo.toml to reference shared deps via { workspace = true } and remove the now-redundant inline version strings. Internal path deps (anvilml-core etc) are unchanged. cargo build --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml-registry: fix db::open to create missing database file
context: P7-C1 upgraded sqlx; if still <0.9 after P7-C1, upgrade to current stable first. Fix db::open in crates/anvilml-registry/src/db.rs: replace SqlitePoolOptions::connect(path_str) with SqliteConnectOptions::new().filename(path).create_if_missing(true), then connect_with(opts). Add SqliteConnectOptions import from sqlx::sqlite. Remove fs::File::create pre-creation workaround from crates/anvilml-server/tests/api_models.rs setup_test_env. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0; delete anvilml.db then cargo run exits without DB panic.

description: anvilml-hardware: explicit detector warnings + Vulkan extension fix
context: Audit every silent Ok(vec![])/unwrap_or_default() discard in crates/anvilml-hardware/src/ (vulkan.rs, dxgi.rs, sysfs.rs, nvml.rs, lib.rs); replace each with tracing::warn!(detector, error). In vulkan.rs fix root cause: remove KHR_driver_properties + EXT_memory_budget from create_instance enabled_extension_names (device-level extensions; AMD ICD rejects them causing silent DXGI fallback); pass empty slice; guard properties2 calls with per-device enumerate_device_extension_properties check. cargo clippy --workspace exits 0. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml-registry + anvilml-server: silent error discard fixes
context: Audit silent discards outside anvilml-hardware. In crates/anvilml-registry/src/scanner.rs scan_dirs: replace Err(_)=>continue on walkdir entry errors and metadata() errors with tracing::warn!(path, error); replace canonicalize().unwrap_or_else(|_|...) with a warn+fallback. In crates/anvilml-server/src/handlers/models.rs: in list_models Err(_e) arm add tracing::error!(error=%e) and return proper JSON error body {error,message} at 500; in get_model Err(_e) arm add tracing::error!(error=%e). cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings exits 0. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml: fix OS field blank and stray colon in --print-hardware output
context: Two bugs in backend/src/main.rs print_hardware_table. (1) OS line: format string passes " ".repeat(50-8) instead of hw.host.os — the field is never rendered; also has a literal trailing colon after the placeholder. Fix: println!("|| OS:          {}", hw.host.os). (2) populate_host_info in crates/anvilml-hardware/src/lib.rs: sysinfo 0.32 System::name() returns Some("") on Windows; replace with System::long_os_version().or_else(|| System::name()).unwrap_or_else(|| "Unknown".to_string()). cargo run -- --print-hardware shows a non-empty OS string without a stray colon.

description: anvilml: upgrade thiserror to 2.x and sha2 to 0.11.x
context: thiserror: bump [workspace.dependencies] from 1.x to 2.x. AnvilError in error.rs implements Display/Error/From manually and does not use the derive macro, so no code changes needed — the dep is inert. sha2: bump from 0.10.x to 0.11.x. Usage is entirely local (Sha256::new/.update/.finalize/hex::encode in scanner.rs); no public Digest trait bounds exposed. Verify hex 0.4.3 still compiles with sha2 0.11 output (GenericArray is AsRef<[u8]>). cargo build --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml-core: migrate toml dependency from 0.8.x to 1.x
context: toml 1.0 broke three sites: (1) config_load.rs: ConfigError::Toml(toml::de::Error) — update error type path; update From<toml::de::Error> impl. (2) config.rs tests: toml::to_string_pretty moved to toml::ser::to_string_pretty; update call sites. (3) backend/tests/config_reference.rs: same to_string_pretty move plus toml::Value usage — verify Value API unchanged. Bump [workspace.dependencies] toml from 0.8.x to 1.x. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0. cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings exits 0.

description: anvilml-server: migrate axum from 0.7.x to 0.8.x (+ tower 0.4→0.5)
context: axum 0.8 breaks handler extractor ordering and Router API; tower must move to 0.5 simultaneously. Consult mcp-rust-docs for axum 0.8 and tower 0.5 migration guides before touching any file. Audit every handler in crates/anvilml-server/src/handlers/ and ws/: State<Arc<AppState>> must be first extractor. Update Router::with_state calls and any MethodRouter usage. Update [workspace.dependencies] axum to 0.8.x and tower to 0.5.x. cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings exits 0. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.
